wine_schools.name: Ecole du Vin de Bordeaux (CIVB)
wine_schools.description: The official Bordeaux Wine School run by the CIVB (Conseil Interprofessionnel du Vin de Bordeaux), offering half-day to full-week structured programmes in French and English. From introduction to WSET-aligned advanced study.
wine_schools.price_range: EUR 45 half-day introduction to EUR 550 full-week certification

wine_schools.name: WSET Bordeaux Approved Programme Provider
wine_schools.description: WSET Level 2 and Level 3 Award in Wines programmes delivered in Bordeaux by an accredited provider, with emphasis on Bordeaux appellations and classification systems. Internationally recognised qualifications.

wine_schools.name: Caudalie Vinotherapie Wine Workshops
wine_schools.address: Chateau Smith Haut Lafitte, 33650 Martillac, France
wine_schools.description: Structured wine education workshops at Les Sources de Caudalie adjacent to Chateau Smith Haut Lafitte. Half-day guided sessions cover Pessac-Leognan classification, blending trials, sensory analysis, and food-wine pairing.
courses_offered: Sensory analysis and food-wine pairing workshop
Vertical tasting of Smith Haut Lafitte across five vintages
certifications: Chateau Smith Haut Lafitte participation certificate

verified.address_quoted: Chateau Smith Haut Lafitte, 33650 Martillac, France

wine_schools.name: Saint-Emilion Wine Experience (Maison du Vin)
wine_schools.description: Wine education programmes run by the Saint-Emilion wine union at the Maison du Vin. Covers Right Bank classification, Merlot and Cabernet Franc identification, and structured Grand Cru tasting sessions for professionals and visitors.
courses_offered: Vertical tasting of premier grand cru classé wines
wine_schools.price_range: EUR 35 introductory session to EUR 180 full-day programme
certifications: Maison du Vin de Saint-Emilion participation certificate
